text: Added Opus 4.5! https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5
Fixed a regression where search tools unnecessarily asked for permissions
Fixed `claude mcp list` silently reporting no servers when `.mcp.json` can't be parsed (e.g. using VS Code's `"servers"` key instead of `"mcpServers"`) — now shows configuration errors
assigned_themes: External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability; Configuration as a Layered Policy Hierarchy

text: Renamed /allowed-tools -> /permissions
assigned_themes: Permission & Security Boundaries; UI Navigation & Command Surfaces

text: Headless `--output-format stream-json`: `init.plugin_errors` now includes `--plugin-dir` load failures in addition to dependency demotions
assigned_themes: Extensibility Ecosystem: Plugins, Skills & Hooks; Resource Monitoring, Observability & Performance

text: Fixed unauthorized claude.ai MCP connectors showing as "failed" instead of "needs auth", and headless `-p` mode retrying non-transient 4xx connection failures
assigned_themes: External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability; Permission & Security Boundaries

text: `--dangerously-skip-permissions` no longer prompts for writes to `.claude/skills/`, `.claude/agents/`, and `.claude/commands/`
Fixed `thinking.type.enabled is not supported` 400 error when using Opus 4.7 via a Bedrock Application Inference Profile ARN
Added `sandbox.failIfUnavailable` setting to exit with an error when sandbox is enabled but cannot start, instead of running unsandboxed
Bedrock: Updated default Sonnet model to Sonnet 4
assigned_themes: Model Behavior & Inference Controls; External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability

text: Fixed hooks receiving a non-existent `transcript_path` after `EnterWorktree` switches the working directory
assigned_themes: Workspace Isolation & File-System Operations; Extensibility Ecosystem: Plugins, Skills & Hooks

text: Reduced baseline memory by ~16MB by deferring Yoga WASM preloading
assigned_themes: Resource Monitoring, Observability & Performance; Terminal Rendering & Display

text: Fixed slash command autocomplete selecting wrong command when typing similar commands (e.g., `/context` vs `/compact`)
Fixed cache-miss warning appearing spuriously after `/clear` or compaction when changing `/effort` or `/model`
assigned_themes: Context Window as a Finite, Managed Resource; Model Behavior & Inference Controls

text: Improved stale worktree cleanup — worktrees left behind after an interrupted parallel run are now automatically cleaned up
assigned_themes: Workspace Isolation & File-System Operations; Multi-Agent Orchestration & Task Lifecycle

text: Fixed worktree file copy on Windows
Added `workspace.git_worktree` to the status line JSON input, set whenever the current directory is inside a linked git worktree
assigned_themes: Workspace Isolation & File-System Operations; Terminal Rendering & Display

text: Fixed unbounded memory growth in long sessions by capping file history snapshots
assigned_themes: Resource Monitoring, Observability & Performance; Workspace Isolation & File-System Operations

text: Added `ExitWorktree` tool to leave an `EnterWorktree` session
Fixed screen flashing blank after being idle for a few seconds
MCP tool descriptions and server instructions are now capped at 2KB to prevent OpenAPI-generated servers from bloating context
Added deprecation notification for npm installations - run `claude install` or see https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/getting-started for more options
`/buddy` is here for April 1st — hatch a small creature that watches you code
[SDK] Changed minimum zod peer dependency to ^4.0.0
Fixed a panic ("switch on corrupted value") on Windows
Vim bindings for text input - enable with /vim or /config
IDE: Various improvements and bug fixes
Fixed a crash on Node.js 18
Fixed `DISABLE_TELEMETRY` / `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC` not suppressing usage metrics telemetry for API and enterprise users
Fixed `/plugin` uninstall dialog: pressing `n` now correctly uninstalls the plugin while preserving its data directory
Fixed ENAMETOOLONG errors for deeply-nested directory paths
Fixed unnecessary config disk writes on every skill invocation that could cause performance issues and config corruption on Windows
assigned_themes: Configuration as a Layered Policy Hierarchy

text: Fixed `--resume` failing on large sessions when a transcript line was corrupted by an unclean shutdown — the corrupt line is now skipped
Fixed unbounded memory growth (10GB+ RSS) when a stdio MCP server writes non-protocol data to stdout
assigned_themes: External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability; Resource Monitoring, Observability & Performance

text: Enhanced /doctor command with CLAUDE.md and MCP tool context for self-serve debugging
assigned_themes: Resource Monitoring, Observability & Performance; External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability

text: Fixed a bug where duplicate `control_response` messages (e.g. from WebSocket reconnects) could cause API 400 errors by pushing duplicate assistant messages into the conversation.
assigned_themes: External Connectivity: MCP Servers, Providers & Network Reliability

text: Fixed inbound channel notifications being silently dropped after the first message for Team/Enterprise users
Added tab completion for shell commands in bash mode
Skill-listing truncation is no longer shown as a startup notification — run `/doctor` for the full breakdown
Hooks now receive the active effort level via the `effort.level` JSON input field and the `$CLAUDE_EFFORT` environment variable, and Bash tool commands can read `$CLAUDE_EFFORT`
assigned_themes: Extensibility Ecosystem: Plugins, Skills & Hooks; Model Behavior & Inference Controls
